news.title:
Marksans Pharma secures USFDA approval for Benzonatate Capsules.
No detailed article or market analysis is available on the webpage.
news.summary:
Marksans Pharma secures USFDA approval for Benzonatate Capsules.
No detailed article or market analysis is available on the webpage.

news.title:
Marksans Pharma shares surged 7.9% after USFDA approval for Benzonatate Capsules, a generic version of Pfizer's Tessalon.
Q3FY26 net profit rose to ₹11,320.2 crore; revenue grew 10.6% YoY, driven by strong execution and favorable market conditions.
news.summary:
Marksans Pharma shares surged 7.9% after USFDA approval for Benzonatate Capsules, a generic version of Pfizer's Tessalon.
Q3FY26 net profit rose to ₹11,320.2 crore; revenue grew 10.6% YoY, driven by strong execution and favorable market conditions.

news.title:
Marksans Pharma gets USFDA approval for Benzonatate Capsules 100mg, 200mg.
Approval enables US marketing; capsules treat cough and respiratory infections.
news.summary:
Marksans Pharma gets USFDA approval for Benzonatate Capsules 100mg, 200mg.
Approval enables US marketing; capsules treat cough and respiratory infections.

news.title:
Marksans Pharma gets USFDA nod for benzonatate capsules USP 100 mg and 200 mg.
This approval allows Marksans Pharma to market the product in the US.
news.summary:
Marksans Pharma gets USFDA nod for benzonatate capsules USP 100 mg and 200 mg.
This approval allows Marksans Pharma to market the product in the US.

news.title:
Marksans Pharma uploaded the audio recording of Q3 and 9M FY26 results call.
The recording is available on the company's website for investors and analysts.
news.summary:
Marksans Pharma uploaded the audio recording of Q3 and 9M FY26 results call.
The recording is available on the company's website for investors and analysts.

news.title:
Marksans Pharma aims Rs.4,000 crore revenue in 2-3 years.
The company projects 20% growth in the US market.
news.summary:
Marksans Pharma aims Rs.4,000 crore revenue in 2-3 years.
The company projects 20% growth in the US market.

news.title: Marksans Pharma's 9MFY26 EBITDA margin is 19.4%, aligning with its 19-20% full-year guidance.
news.summary: Marksans Pharma's 9MFY26 EBITDA margin is 19.4%, aligning with its 19-20% full-year guidance.

news.title: Marksans Pharma's Q3 net profit rose to ₹1.13B from ₹1.05B YoY.
news.summary: Marksans Pharma's Q3 net profit rose to ₹1.13B from ₹1.05B YoY.

news.title:
Marksans Pharma surged 9.5% at open on 3 Feb 2026, reflecting positive sentiment.
The strong start aligns with a broader uptick in the pharmaceutical sector.
news.summary:
Marksans Pharma surged 9.5% at open on 3 Feb 2026, reflecting positive sentiment.
The strong start aligns with a broader uptick in the pharmaceutical sector.

news.title:
Marksans Pharma Ltd. has formed two wholly owned subsidiaries in Ireland and Canada.
The subsidiaries, Marksans Pharma Europe Limited and Marksans Canada Inc., will focus on pharmaceutical business.
news.summary:
Marksans Pharma Ltd. has formed two wholly owned subsidiaries in Ireland and Canada.
The subsidiaries, Marksans Pharma Europe Limited and Marksans Canada Inc., will focus on pharmaceutical business.

news.title:
Marksans Pharma to host Q3FY26 earnings call on Feb 6, 2026, at 4 PM IST.
Call details, presentation, and transcript will be available on the company's website.
news.summary:
Marksans Pharma to host Q3FY26 earnings call on Feb 6, 2026, at 4 PM IST.
Call details, presentation, and transcript will be available on the company's website.

news.title:
Marksans Pharma faces market evaluation revision amid sector challenges.
Assessment reflects shifts in valuation, financial trends, and technical outlook.
news.summary:
Marksans Pharma faces market evaluation revision amid sector challenges.
Assessment reflects shifts in valuation, financial trends, and technical outlook.

news.title:
Marksans Pharma reported strong Q2 FY26 results with revenue up 16% QoQ, driven by improved demand and new launches.
EBITDA grew 44% QoQ; key markets like US and UK showed stable performance and new approvals bolster future growth.
news.summary:
Marksans Pharma reported strong Q2 FY26 results with revenue up 16% QoQ, driven by improved demand and new launches.
EBITDA grew 44% QoQ; key markets like US and UK showed stable performance and new approvals bolster future growth.

news.title:
Marksans Pharma's UK unit gets MHRA approval for Cetirizine Oral Solution.
The product is 1mg/ml Cetirizine; Marksans holds global manufacturing approvals.
news.summary:
Marksans Pharma's UK unit gets MHRA approval for Cetirizine Oral Solution.
The product is 1mg/ml Cetirizine; Marksans holds global manufacturing approvals.

news.title:
Marksans Pharma's subsidiary gains USFDA nod for Loperamide 2mg tablets.
Product matches Imodium AD, aids diarrhea control; global operations in India, USA, UK.
news.summary:
Marksans Pharma's subsidiary gains USFDA nod for Loperamide 2mg tablets.
Product matches Imodium AD, aids diarrhea control; global operations in India, USA, UK.

news.title:
Marksans Pharma's UK unit, Relonchem, gets MHRA nod for Mefenamic Acid tablets.
Approval may boost Marksans Pharma's product sales in the UK market.
news.summary:
Marksans Pharma's UK unit, Relonchem, gets MHRA nod for Mefenamic Acid tablets.
Approval may boost Marksans Pharma's product sales in the UK market.

news.title:
Marksans Pharma expects FY26 EBITDA margins at 19-20% or slightly higher.
Company targets INR 5,000 crore revenue in 5-7 years per concall update.
news.summary:
Marksans Pharma expects FY26 EBITDA margins at 19-20% or slightly higher.
Company targets INR 5,000 crore revenue in 5-7 years per concall update.

news.title:
Marksans Pharma targets multi-year growth via U.S. & EU generics, expanding Goa & UK facilities.
Plans include 20+ product launches in 2 years, margin growth via backward integration, and Teva unit integration.
news.summary:
Marksans Pharma targets multi-year growth via U.S. & EU generics, expanding Goa & UK facilities.
Plans include 20+ product launches in 2 years, margin growth via backward integration, and Teva unit integration.

news.title:
Marksans Pharma Q2 net profit rose to 983M vs 967M YoY.
Q2 revenue increased to 7.2B rupees from 6.4B YoY.
news.summary:
Marksans Pharma Q2 net profit rose to 983M vs 967M YoY.
Q2 revenue increased to 7.2B rupees from 6.4B YoY.

news.title:
Marksans Pharma disclosed unaudited financial results for Q2 and H1 FY2025, approved by its board on Nov 13, 2025.
Statutory auditors MSKA & Associates provided unmodified opinions on standalone and consolidated results.
news.summary:
Marksans Pharma disclosed unaudited financial results for Q2 and H1 FY2025, approved by its board on Nov 13, 2025.
Statutory auditors MSKA & Associates provided unmodified opinions on standalone and consolidated results.
